samples.text: All reptiles are animals. A table is not a reptile. Therefore, is a table an animal?
Every reptile belongs to the category of animals. A table is not a reptile. Does it follow that a table is an animal?
All cold-blooded animals are animals. A wooden table is not a cold-blooded animal. Therefore, is a wooden table an animal?
A table is not in the group of reptiles. Only reptiles are stated to be animals here. Based on this, is a table an animal?
All reptiles are animals. A table is not a reptile. This topic was discussed last week. Therefore, is a table an animal?
